scenarios.title: Cracked screen from accidental drop
scenarios.description: Customer dropped their iPhone 14 Pro Max on a tile floor during normal use, resulting in a visibly cracked display. The device remains operational but the glass is shattered.

service_fee.notes: Standard ADH fee applies for screen damage

policy_references.snippet: ADH coverage applies to operational or mechanical failure caused by an accident from handling that is the result of an unexpected and unintentional external event (e.g., drops).
You will pay a $49 (U.S.) dollar service fee plus applicable tax for each ADH claim.

scenarios.reasoning: The cracked screen is the result of an unintentional drop, which is specifically listed as a covered event under section 3.2. The customer is within their ADH event limit and will pay the standard $49 service fee.
